title: Pterostylis despectans
taxonomy: Pterostylis despectans is classified as a species within the genus Pterostylis, which is a part of the orchid family (Orchidaceae). The plant is native to Australia and is a terrestrial orchid. Pterostylis despectans is a relatively small orchid with unique features, such as a distinctive leaf shape and a flower structure that is often white or greenish in color. The classification of Pterostylis despectans is further categorized under the family Orchidaceae and the order Asparagales. As of my knowledge, Pterostylis despectans is considered a rare and endemic species to certain regions in Australia.
